Name: SMGW(Smart Meter Gateway)
Description: Collects meter data, packages it as InfoReports, controls home appliances via ControlMessages.
Threats:
• Insider Privilege Abuse
  • Privacy Leakage via Smart Meter Data
Commet: TR-03109is the core technical standard for SMGWs in Germany, defining security and communication.MsbGis the legal basis. Both aremandatoryfor German SMGWs.

Name: VNB-SCADA(Distribution System Operator SCADA)
Description: Supervisory control and data acquisition for smart meters, CLS, and grid devices.
Commet: SCADA systems in the distribution grid typically useIEC 60870-5/6(telecontrol) orIEC 61850(automation).IEC 62351secures these protocols.

Name: Outage Management System(OMS)
Description: Fault detection by polling SMGWs, evaluating responses (ANSI C12.22/DLMS).
Commet: Relies onIEC 61970/61968for information models andIEC 62351for security.BSI IT-Grundschutzapplies for general IT security.

Name: Operational Data Store
Description: Central storage for grid operational data.
Commet: BSI IT-Grundschutzis key for data storage security.IT-SiG/KRITISapplies if the system is part of critical infrastructure.

Name: IDS/SIEM
Description: Intrusion Detection System & Security Information & Event Management: real-time monitoring, log analysis, event correlation.
Commet: These systems are part ofISMS(Information Security Management System), covered byBSI IT-Grundschutzand, if critical,IT-SiG/KRITIS.

Name: CRL-Server
Description: Provides Certificate Revocation Lists for secure certificate handling.
Commet: Certificate handling for SMGWs is defined inTR-03109.TR-02102covers relevant cryptographic mechanisms.

Name: PMU(Phasor Measurement Unit)
Description: Measures phasor values with PTP timestamp, streams to WAMS.

Name: WAMS-Backend
Description: Wide Area Monitoring System: collects, visualizes, analyzes phasor data for operators.

Name: DSO-DMS
Description: Real-time grid operation, monitoring, load/voltage control, FLISR, based on InfoReports & other data.
Threats:
• Insider Privilege Abuse
  • Privacy Leakage via Smart Meter Data
Commet: IEC 61970/61968for information models,IEC 62351for secure comm.,BSI IT-Grundschutzfor general security.

Name: Protected-IED
Description: Protection relay (distance/differential), monitoring, trip commands via GOOSE.

Name: Operator UI
Description: Grid operator dashboard for interaction with the system.
Threats:
• Insider Privilege Abuse
  • Social Engineering
  • API Abuse
  • Privacy Leakage
  • Fingerprinting
  • Privileged Access Abuse
Commet: Access control, authentication, logging covered byBSI IT-Grundschutz.IT-SiG/KRITISapplies if critical.

Name: DER-Gateway
Description: Interface to distributed energy resources for setpoints & telemetry.
Commet: IEC 61851(charging),ISO 15118(V2G),IEC 63110(EV infra),BSI IT-Grundschutzfor general security. Growing relevance with DER expansion.

Name: VPP Operator
Description: Virtual power plant management: registration, aggregation, scheduling.

Name: Microgrid Controller
Description: Control interface for grid-connected microgrids; shows MMS reports, sends dispatch commands.

Name: Customer DER/IoT
Description: Devices like balcony PV, home battery, smart appliances.

Name: Head-End System/Integration Layer
Description: Central data integration & secure exchange between grid and enterprise IT.
Commet: TR-03109if part of smart metering,BSI IT-Grundschutzfor general security,IT-SiG/KRITISif critical.

Name: Remote Maintenance/Update Server
Description: Provides remote device maintenance and firmware updates.
Commet: BSI IT-Grundschutzfor secure remote access,IT-SiG/KRITISif critical.

Name: Forecasting System
Description: Predicts generation (e.g., solar/wind) and load patterns.
